title: Exhaustive Review: bridge-zephyr 2026-06-27
description: Multi-round exhaustive code review of Zephyr C code in firmware/bridge-zephyr. Target: convergence (0 new findings for 2 rounds).
notes:
2026-06-29 review pass: avoided paths touched by prior Zephyr review-fix commits found via git log grep. Reviewed remaining project-owned Zephyr/C surfaces under firmware/bridge-zephyr and lichen, excluding upstream zephyr/ checkout and generated build trees. New findings filed as project-LICHEN-9nrr.1 through project-LICHEN-9nrr.5 covering lichen/lib/native/native.c, lichen/apps/{gateway,puck}/src/main.c interactions, firmware/bridge-zephyr/boards/station_g2.overlay, and lichen/tests/senml/zcbor_stub/zcbor_encode.c.
2026-06-29 follow-up map/list audit: searched project-owned Zephyr/C CBOR encode/decode paths for unordered map assumptions versus ordered list/array usage. Confirmed prior project-LICHEN-9nrr.2 covers native message type key-0-first dispatch. Added project-LICHEN-9nrr.6 for log_subscribe's second-stage positional/simple map parser. Other checked CBOR use is encoding-only (native outbound, gateway status/config, SenML) or spec/RFC ordered arrays/sequences (OSCORE info/AAD, EDHOC message elements), so no additional unordered-map issue filed there.
2026-06-29 magic-byte/decoder follow-up: tightened project-LICHEN-9nrr.2 and .6 acceptance so fixes use decoder-backed CBOR parsing instead of expanding ad hoc byte walkers. Added project-LICHEN-9nrr.7 for Zephyr gateway PUT /config accepting arbitrary payloads without CBOR decoding. Focused C scan found remaining raw offsets mostly in fixed-format RPL/SCHC/link headers or outbound-only CBOR encoding; no additional unordered CBOR-map decoder bug filed from those.
2026-06-29 packet-header stride audit: confirmed direct byte peeks are common in fixed-format packet parsers. Filed project-LICHEN-9nrr.8 for the C SCHC compressor, where IPv6/UDP/CoAP/ICMPv6/RPL offsets are repeated across rule selection and compression. Rust/Python IPv6/RPL paths centralize many peeks inside parser structs/functions, so noted but did not file broader issue there.
2026-06-29 SCHC dependency decision: user agreed with keeping the immediate SCHC implementation and refactoring header accessors, while evaluating libSCHC separately rather than swapping libraries casually. Closed premature OpenSCHC implementation task project-LICHEN-9nrr.9 as superseded; added project-LICHEN-9nrr.10 to evaluate libSCHC as a Zephyr module against license, memory/code size, rule model, LoRa assumptions, fragmentation behavior, and existing vectors.
2026-06-29 generic SCHC module follow-up: added project-LICHEN-9nrr.11 to create a reusable Zephyr SCHC module, separate from project-LICHEN-9nrr.10 libSCHC evaluation. The module should separate generic RFC 8724 engine/API from LICHEN-specific rules and preserve current vectors.
2026-06-29 feature-completeness audit: confirmed previously cited gaps were not all beaded. Existing detailed Beads cover PUT /config (9nrr.7) and native send_message capability mismatch (9nrr.3). Added feature-gap Beads for gateway RPL signalling (9nrr.13), BLE UART IPv6 mesh injection (9nrr.14), standalone LoRa RX mode (9nrr.15), and link-layer encrypted frame handling (9nrr.16).
2026-06-29 workflow rule added: every small code-generation/fix Bead must be followed by two code-review passes before closure. Applied explicit acceptance text to current open Zephyr/C fix and feature-gap Beads: 9nrr.1-.8, .10, .11, .13-.16.
close_reason: Closed after all project-LICHEN-9nrr.* child Beads were completed or superseded. The epic's Zephyr/C review findings from the 2026-06-27 bridge-zephyr exhaustive review have corresponding closed child Beads through project-LICHEN-9nrr.34, including CBOR decoder fixes, SCHC header accessor/module work, gateway/bridge feature gaps, LR1110/T1000-E build fixes, puck/gateway board configuration fixes, native concurrency coverage, and local Twister setup documentation. Final verification in this session included the relevant task-level tests/builds and a passing local Twister run for lichen/tests/native_parse using the documented venv setup. No ready open project-LICHEN-9nrr child remains according to bd ready and bd list.
